name: muzic-spotify-clone
description: Professional Spotify Clone - Full Stack Music Streaming Platform with Admin Panel

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../admin-panel && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend

author: Your Name
